name: Haupia (Hawaiian Coconut Dessert) Fbfj97a
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure 1/4 cup of coconut and set aside.
2. In a bowl, pour the hot milk over the remaining coconut and let stand for 30 minutes.
3. Strain the mixture through cheesecloth, squeezing out excess liquid. Discard the coconut.
4. In a saucepan, combine cornstarch and sugar. Stir in the flavored milk.
5. Cook, stirring constantly until bubbly and thick.
6. Pour into a greased baking dish.
7. Sprinkle with the reserved coconut.
8. Chill until firm.
